epigraph.quote: I liked Brancusi Fish 1926. Bronze fish on a bronze pond. Not fins + scales but the essence of its spirit.

per_stop.quote: we drove to Coleshill & bought a Brompton folding bike
Peter went on a flight simulator. John liked the Radar. Charles liked looking at the model aeroplanes.
We shan't be coming to Picketts Lock again, because it the cinema building is being demolished for a national athletics centre.
